heading: Prohibition against assignment or transportation of students to overcome racial imbalance
label: 1751 Prohibition against assignment or transportation of students to overcome racial imbalance
text: No provision of this Act shall be construed to require the assignment or transportation of students or teachers in order to overcome racial imbalance.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Education Amendments of 1974. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 1974 Amendment note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 93–38088 Stat. 484section 6301 of this titleAug. 21, 1974
